DJI已經跌左差唔多400點 有外國評論已經將香港示威同中美磨擦問題一部份

replies.msg: 屌個閪搞到金融風暴 + 世界大戰

國際機場組織（Airports Council International）周四（20日）公布全球2017年最繁忙機場排行榜。美國哈茨菲爾德—傑克遜亞特蘭大國際機場（Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport）繼2016年後再度榮登榜首，香港國際機場則排行第八，名次與前一年相同。

據國際機場組織公布的數據顯示，全球客運量比前一年增長7.5%，達83億人次，為有紀錄以來最大增幅。報告特別提到中國與印度，兩個國家所佔的客運量，已經達到全球機場客運量的34.5%。全球十大繁忙機場之中，除香港機場外，另有2個位於中國的機場。

報告講述亞特蘭大機場排名第一的原因，與亞特蘭大市是北美口岸及重要樞紐城市有關，從亞特蘭大機場所出發的航班，2小時航程內可以到達的各地城市，人口覆蓋範圍達到全美國8成，但報告也指出亞特蘭大機場有隱憂，客運量在去年下跌了0.3%。

另外，全球貨運量亦上升7.7%，香港則繼續成為世界上最大的航空貨運樞紐。報告又提到，全球飛機升降次數亦增加3%，達9580萬次。

塞機場
機場
終於錫中春袋
美國都出哂聲 教下路

十項推文 試著說

811警暴連環
⒈蓄意謀殺女救護員 影片直證布袋鉛彈瞄準爆眼球 永久失明 面骨碎裂、
⒉插贜竹枝 造偽證 誣陷被捕者、
⒊地鐡站內 水平發射催淚彈CS神經毒氣、
⒋警喬裝示威者 發動衝擊縱火、
⒌普通話軍人 多處滲透武統、
⒍一米內行刑 掃射胡椒彈槍、欠釀電梯人踩人、
⒎縱容黑幫橫行 毆打記者路人、
⒏濫暴痛毆 重創被捕者 打掉門牙 血肉模糊、
⒐屋村老人民居 發射催淚彈CS神經毒氣 直噴胡椒屋苑保安
１０. 殘害救護人員、救護員舉旗警告 尖沙咀阻礙救援 違反國際人道法 屬嚴重刑事罪行

August 11, 2019 *** Police Brutality ***

⒈ Macilously and unlawfully cause Greivous Bodily Harm - Gun Aims for the head:
Shooting lean-filled pellet round directly to a First-aider’s eye, causing grievous bodily harm including:
- Right eyeball RUPTURED.
- Permanent BLINDNESS.
- Eyelids and tear ducts LACERATIONS.
- Facial FRACTURED.
⒉ Planting fake evidence on arrested protesters (putting sharp bamboo into protestors’ backpack)
⒊ Unlawfully & Horizontally lauching TEARGAS canisters INDOOR (in MTR subway stations at civilians)
⒋ Officers disguised as demonstrators to take the lead, and incite them to violence.
⒌ Mandarin-speaking officers spotted: suspected to be Mainland China officers undercovering as HKPF.
⒍ SWEEP-SHOTTING protesters with projectiles (Pepperball Pistol) at less than 1m range.
Shoved protesters down escalators (almost causing STAMPEDE).
⒎ Turned a blind eye towards gangsters(who support HK police) chasing up
and beating pedestrians, reporters, and protesters on streets.
⒏ Bloody arrest: Brutally beaten up arrested protester (protester who was under control - wrestled to the ground moaning in pain with front tooth knocked out).
⒐ Launching TEARGAS canisters in suburban area populated by old residential buildings(outside the elderly homes, community centers, and nearby residences). Pepper-sprayed residences’ on-duty security guards.
１０. (Serious Criminal Offence) Obstruction of medical care - in violation of the International Humanitarian Law. First-aider raising the Flag for Warning at TST.

replies.msg: 歷史書上會寫佢係最後一根稻草
林鄭改變世界

An Urgent Call for Hospital Ships

Since June 2019, Hong Kong protesters, reporters, first aiders, medical practitioners and other citizens (including children, elderly and pregnant women) have been facing high levels of threat, excessive force and attacks from government-supported gang members and police officers who do not follow the law and orders. Hong Kong people are attacked regardless of their participation in protests (e.g., people are attacked in MTR stations; those in elderly centres and at home are also affected by the chemical weapons)

The local medical systems are not designed for providing combat medical services (e.g., injuries caused by gunshot and chemical weapons). Medical practitioners and first-aiders are also threatened and attacked in Hong Kong. More importantly, government-supported gang members and police officers even force first-aiders and medics not to help injured citizens.

Given the humanitarian crisis in Hong Kong, we call for immediate help from neutral hospital ships.

----------

quote.msg:
國際機場組織（Airports Council International）周四（20日）公布全球2017年最繁忙機場排行榜。美國哈茨菲爾德—傑克遜亞特蘭大國際機場（Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport）繼2016年後再度榮登榜首，香港國際機場則排行第八，名次與前一年相同。

據國際機場組織公布的數據顯示，全球客運量比前一年增長7.5%，達83億人次，為有紀錄以來最大增幅。報告特別提到中國與印度，兩個國家所佔的客運量，已經達到全球機場客運量的34.5%。全球十大繁忙機場之中，除香港機場外，另有2個位於中國的機場。

報告講述亞特蘭大機場排名第一的原因，與亞特蘭大市是北美口岸及重要樞紐城市有關，從亞特蘭大機場所出發的航班，2小時航程內可以到達的各地城市，人口覆蓋範圍達到全美國8成，但報告也指出亞特蘭大機場有隱憂，客運量在去年下跌了0.3%。

另外，全球貨運量亦上升7.7%，香港則繼續成為世界上最大的航空貨運樞紐。報告又提到，全球飛機升降次數亦增加3%，達9580萬次。
